final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an Amazon product listing image (1:1 square) for a facial cleanser.

Style/medium: Clean commercial product photography, pure white background, bold graphic layout
Composition:
  Vertical composition
  Tube of facial cleanser positioned prominently
  Oversized fluffy foam bubbles filling upper portion of frame
  "STEP 01" label/badge visible in layout
Subject:
  Tube facial cleanser (oil-control, deep-cleansing face wash)
  Voluminous, dense, cloud-like foam bubbles
Scene/backdrop: Pure white background
Lighting/mood: Bright, clean, even lighting — fresh and hygienic feel
Color palette: White dominant, with product packaging colors as accent
Materials/textures: Dense creamy foam texture, smooth tube packaging
Text (verbatim): STEP 01
Constraints:
  1:1 square format
  English text only
  Amazon listing image style
  Foam must appear thick, rich, and voluminous to convey deep-cleansing efficacy
Avoid: Dark backgrounds, lifestyle scenes, human models
